app.title: Electricity Rate Comparison
app.subtitle: Find the best electricity plan for you based on your actual consumption data
app.disclaimer: Prices are based on IEC baseline rate (64 agorot/kWh). Results are estimates only.

upload.title: Upload Your Consumption File
upload.description: Download your consumption data from the IEC website as a CSV file and upload it here.
upload.dropzone: Drag and drop your CSV file here
upload.howTo: How to download your consumption data?
upload.howToDesc: Log in to IEC website → Account Management → Consumption → Download Meter Data
upload.heatmapDesc: Average kWh by hour and day of week

select.title: Select Plans to Compare
select.description: Choose the providers and plans you want to compare. You can also add a custom plan.
select.noneSelected: No plan selected – please select at least one plan

results.title: Comparison Results
results.description: Based on {days} days of consumption data

consumptionChart.title: Monthly Consumption
consumptionChart.subtitle: kWh by month, colored by usage pattern
consumptionChart.partialMonthNote: * Bars with dashed borders indicate partial months (data doesn't cover the full month).

iecLogin.title: Connect Your IEC Account
iecLogin.description: Automatically fetch your consumption data using your Israeli ID number
iecLogin.otpDescription: Enter the code sent to your registered phone or email
iecLogin.fetchingDesc: This may take a few seconds
iecLogin.privacyNote: Your credentials are never stored. Data is fetched once and processed locally.

periodSelector.title: Filter Analysis Period
periodSelector.subtitle: Drag the handles to select a date range for comparison
periodSelector.filteredNote: Results below are filtered to the selected period only.
